Visual verification. Description adjusted for capital 'Y' in 'Yrs' (no trailing period). Amounts adopted from gpt-5-mini as '2 12 2' after careful image inspection; gemini-flash incorrectly read pounds as '1' and shillings as '6', pence as '0'.

Visual verification. Description adopted from gemini-flash ('Banwell' not 'Barnwell', no period after 'Do'). Amounts from gemini-flash are accurate, interpreting dash and tilde as zero, matching ledger conventions. gpt-5-mini incorrectly read '2 6 0'.

Visual verification. Description adopted from gemini-flash (no period after 'Do'). Amounts from gemini-flash are accurate, interpreting dashes and '0' as zero. gpt-5-mini misidentified the pence '0' as a faint '8'.
